description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a robust, slightly weathered wooden handle and a large, angular steel blade. The handle features a textured grip area wrapped in a dark, possibly leather material, providing both comfort and slip resistance. The blade is broad, with a pronounced curve and a sharp edge, and it is securely mounted to the handle with a traditional wedged fitting. The axe head has a matte, slightly rough finish, showing some signs of wear or forging marks. The top of the handle is capped with a metal fitting, adding durability and reinforcing the connection to the blade. No visible brand markings or decorative engravings are present on the axe.
description: A robust axe with a weathered wooden handle, dark grip wrap, and a large, angular steel blade. The blade is securely mounted and shows signs of use.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top-down, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The blade is fully visible from the side, revealing its broad, angular shape and the detailed grip wrapping on the handle.
description_view_2: The back of the axe is shown, highlighting the straight handle and the rear of the blade's mounting.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is visible, displaying the same broad blade and grip details as view 1 but from the reverse angle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a cylindrical cross-section, wrapped in dark leather for grip, slightly weathered and robust.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad steel blade with a curved edge, angular profile, and a pronounced beard; no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a metal cap reinforcing the top of the handle.
